purpose: Manual same-prompt / three-mode verification set. Routing should stay stable while calm, counter, and blunt posture remain visibly distinct.

prompts.prompt: Saving money is more important than investing it.
prompts.why: Value claim for calm vs counter vs blunt comparison.
prompts.notes: calm strengthens; counter qualifies or pressures; blunt rejects and replaces

prompts.why: Social claim for same-prompt posture comparison.
prompts.notes: calm stays in frame; counter pressures weak points; blunt rejects and replaces

prompts.prompt: Remote work has made managers less effective.
prompts.why: Work claim for same-prompt posture comparison.
prompts.notes: routing should remain DIRECT across all three modes

prompts.why: Product claim that should keep the same NARROW move while posture shifts.
prompts.notes: calm asks softly; counter presses; blunt sharpens the missing variable

prompts.why: Cultural claim for same-prompt posture comparison.
prompts.notes: useful for checking that calm and blunt do not collapse together

prompts.why: Unsupported stance claim that should keep the same routing move across all three modes.
prompts.notes: calm basis question; counter firmer basis question; blunt sharp basis question
